specific_question: Between January 1 and September 30, 2025, how many preventive-maintenance schedules did Olivia Martinez’s team update in Elexion Automotive’s digital asset ledger?
answer: Internal Elexion records show that Olivia Martinez’s lifecycle team updated 512 preventive-maintenance schedules between Q1 and Q3, 2025.
